news.headline: Skanska secures $203M supplemental award to build data center in Georgia, USA; approximately SEK 2.1 billion.
news.summary: Skanska, a construction company based in Stockholm, recently announced a new project in Georgia, USA. They have received a supplemental award from a current client to construct a data center. The value of this supplemental award is USD 203 million, equivalent to about SEK 2.1 billion. This project will be added to the US order bookings for the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Colton Underwood appointed as Chief Community Officer at WhiteFlag, aiming to enhance mental health support. MYRTLE BEACH, S.C., Aug. 8, 2024.
news.summary: Colton Underwood has been appointed as the Chief Community Officer of WhiteFlag, a mental health app based in Myrtle Beach, S.C. His role is set to bolster peer-to-peer support and mental health awareness. The app, which operates as a free platform, facilitates anonymous connections among users who have encountered comparable mental health challenges. The announcement of Underwood's new position was made on August 8, 2024, via PRNewswire-PRWeb. This move is aimed at further strengthening the app's ability to provide vital mental health support and resources to those in need.

news.headline: Tripleseat partners with Kolter Hospitality's Courtyard Delray Beach to enhance group sales and event management.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on August 8, 2024, the prominent cloud-based group sales and catering management platform for hotels, Tripleseat, has successfully onboarded Courtyard Delray Beach. This marks the second property from the Kolter Hospitality portfolio to join the platform. The integration of Courtyard Delray Beach brings the total number of properties utilizing Tripleseat from this portfolio to two. This development showcases the continued growth and success of Tripleseat in the hospitality industry, offering efficient solutions for hotels to manage group sales and catering operations seamlessly.

news.headline: Keystone Partners Group, Suburban City Group, and Milex Construction are set to celebrate groundbreaking event for Landmark at Dublin project, augmenting Dublin Borough revitalization.
news.summary: A groundbreaking ceremony was held in Dublin, Pa., on August 8, 2024, to mark the commencement of The Landmark at Dublin project. This development is a crucial part of the revitalization efforts in Dublin Borough. Keystone Partners Group, Suburban City Group, and Milex Construction are the key entities involved in this project. The event highlighted the importance of this significant addition to the area, with an anticipated investment of [Mention significant investment amount] in the revitalization process.

news.headline: Bach to Rock Music School reveals winners of 4th annual national "Battle of the Bands" with 64 bands from US.
news.summary: The Fourth Annual National "Battle of the Bands" competition held by Bach to Rock Music School has revealed its champions. A total of 64 bands hailing from different parts of the United States showcased their talents, with participants ranging from elementary, middle, and high school levels. The event took place in BETHESDA, Md., on August 8, 2024, as reported by PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.headline: Knack Global acquires Merrick Management, Inc., enhancing anesthesia RCM services. Staying ahead in the market.
news.summary: Knack Global ("Knack"), a leading provider of end-to-end revenue cycle management solutions, has recently acquired Merrick Management, Inc. This acquisition, finalized on August 8, 2024, in Coral Springs, Florida, aims to strengthen Knack's position in the anesthesia sector. This move consolidates Knack's market-leading solutions in RCM, enhancing its offerings and expertise in this field. The acquisition signifies a strategic step towards growth and expansion for Knack, showcasing their commitment to providing top-notch services.

news.headline: Lisa Garrett, financial leader, joins Convergent Dental Board of Directors. Aug 8, 2024. Solea® Dental Laser company.
news.summary: Lisa Garrett, a prominent figure in healthcare and finance, has been appointed to the Board of Directors of Convergent Dental, a leading company based in Waltham, Massachusetts. The announcement was made on August 8, 2024, and marks a significant addition to the board. Convergent Dental is known for its innovative Solea® All-Tissue Dental Laser, and the appointment of Lisa Garrett is expected to bring valuable expertise to the company.

news.headline: Capital University to match net tuition costs for transfer students enrolling this fall from Ohio private colleges. Must be new to Capital.
news.summary: Capital University has introduced a Tuition Transfer Match initiative for incoming students this fall, which will match the net tuition expenses for all accepted or currently enrolled transfer students from Ohio private, non-profit colleges or universities. To be eligible, students must be new to Capital University...

news.headline: AllenComm launches podcast series, Learner Experience Evolution, to support L&D leaders in creating innovative learning experiences and driving organizational change.
news.summary: A company specializing in learning advisory, design, technology, and talent solutions, AllenComm, recently initiated a podcast series titled Learner Experience Evolution. This podcast aims to assist in the development of cutting-edge learning experiences and fostering organizational transformation. The launch took place in Salt Lake City, Utah on August 8, 2024.

news.headline: ReGen Medical Management named Best Cellular Therapy Clinic in NYC for 2024 by LUXlife Magazine.Helmed by Dr. Steven Victor.
news.summary: Under the leadership of Dr. Steven Victor, ReGen Medical Management is a top provider in regenerative medicine and patient services. In New York, as of August 8, 2024, the clinic has been honored as the "Best Cellular Therapy Clinic 2024" by LUXlife Magazine. This recognition underscores their commitment to excellence in healthcare.

news.headline: Baptist Memorial Health Care sees 33% drop in referral processing time, 98% decrease in scheduling time, and 11.5% boost in productivity with ReferralMD.
news.summary: Baptist Memorial Health Care has made significant enhancements to its referral management process in partnership with ReferralMD, resulting in a 33% decrease in referral processing time. Appointment scheduling time has also been reduced by an impressive 98%, leading to a notable increase in productivity by 11.5%. This development was reported from Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina on August 8, 2024, through PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.headline: WiCyS and ISC2 join forces to launch Fall Camp for cybersecurity certification, supporting women in cybersecurity.
news.summary: WiCyS, a nonprofit focused on increasing the participation of women in cybersecurity, has partnered with ISC2, a prominent organization for cybersecurity professionals. This collaboration aims to further the recruitment, retention, and progression of women in the field. The alliance, known as WiCyS + ISC2, seeks to leverage the strengths of both organizations to address the underrepresentation of women in cybersecurity.

news.headline: adQuadrant selected as 1 of 15 TikTok Marketing Partners in the USA, showcasing their digital marketing prowess.
news.summary: A leading digital marketing agency named adQuadrant has recently become a part of the TikTok Marketing Partners Program. The agency, based in Irvine, California, made this announcement on August 8, 2024. This achievement highlights adQuadrant's proficiency as a badged TikTok Agency Partner, showcasing their skill in creating effective marketing strategies on the platform.

news.headline: Mercy Medical Center in Baltimore receives core certification for spinal surgery from The Joint Commission on Aug 8, 2024.
news.summary: Mercy Medical Center in Baltimore has been granted core certification for spinal surgery by The Joint Commission after meeting its performance standards. This recognition was announced on August 8, 2024.

news.headline: Headquartered in Seattle, Clark Nuber PS named a top 100 firm by INSIDE Public Accounting for 2024.
news.summary: A CPA and advisory firm, Clark Nuber PS, based in the Seattle metro region, has been recognized in the 2024 IPA Top 100 Firms by INSIDE Public Accounting. The company is headquartered in Bellevue, Wash. This news was announced on August 8, 2024, through a press release on PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.headline: Introspect Tech releases SV7C-PAM3, a new 12-Channel BERT for GDDR7, USB 4. Leading electronic test & measurement manufacturer.
news.summary: Introducing the SV7C-PAM3, a cutting-edge 12-Channel Bit Error Rate Tester designed for GDDR7, USB 4, and various interfaces. Manufactured by Introspect Technology in Santa Clara, California, this highly integrated tester aims to meet the demands of high-speed digital testing. The product launch took place on August 8, 2024, showcasing the company's dedication to innovation in the field.

news.headline: Quartet introduces 4 new sizes of InvisaMount Glass Boards, GREENGUARD Gold Certified, in Vivid White.
news.summary: Quartet, a well-known brand under ACCO Brands, has introduced four new sizes to their InvisaMount Glass Board line, now available in Vivid White color and horizontal format. These glass boards are GREENGUARD Gold certified, ensuring safe indoor air quality. The company, based in Lake Zurich, Illinois, made this announcement on August 8, 2024. Quartet continues to innovate in the manufacturing of glass dry-erase boards, offering more size options for customers to choose from.

news.headline: Chris Panos from Fork Union Military Academy chosen to coach Greece Men's Lacrosse at 2024 World Box Championships.
news.summary: Fork Union Military Academy has recently shared the news that Chris Panos, the head coach of the Academy's Postgraduate Lacrosse program, has been chosen to lead the first-ever Greece Men's Lacrosse Indoor Team by the Greece Lacrosse Association. This appointment was confirmed in the previous week. Panos will guide the team in their upcoming ventures.

news.headline: Storelocal Storage Iowa City named "Best Self Storage Facility in Iowa City" by 2024 Iowa City Community Choice Awards.
news.summary: Storelocal Storage Iowa City was recently named "The Best Self Storage Facility in Iowa City" in the 2024 Iowa City Community Choice Awards. This esteemed title was awarded to Storelocal Storage Iowa City in Iowa City, Iowa, on August 8, 2024. The award serves as a testament to the exceptional services provided by the facility, solidifying its reputation as a top choice for storage solutions in the area. This recognition further underscores the significance of Storelocal Storage Iowa City in the community, showcasing its commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Encored Technologies partners with GGGI for microgrid project in Indonesia. Aims to set up PV-ESS AI model on Bangkalan Island.
news.summary: Encored Technologies Inc. has been chosen as the preferred partner for the UN-affiliated Global Green Growth Institute's (GGGI) BKCF Fund Initiative. The company aims to create a standard model for a photovoltaic energy storage system (PV-ESS) based AI microgrid on Bangkalan Island, Indonesia. The initiative is set to be established in Seoul, South Korea, with developments commencing on August 8, 2024. This partnership marks a significant milestone for Encored Technologies Inc. as they lead the way in energy innovation and sustainable practices on a global scale.

news.headline: RefrigiWear unveils FrostFlex™ Thermal PPE System at ASSP Safety24, leading supplier of insulated workwear.
news.summary: A top company specializing in insulated workwear for extreme temperatures introduces the FrostFlex™ System at ASSP Safety24. On Aug. 8, 2024, in Denver, RefrigiWear showcased their new system, designed to provide flexibility for workers in cold environments. This company is a key player in providing insulated work apparel for the cold chain industry. The unveiling of the FrostFlex™ System marks a significant development for workers dealing with extreme temperatures.

news.headline: IOTA creates Digital Product Passports for electronics, improving transparency and sustainability in the lifecycle. #innovation #blockchain
news.summary: The IOTA Foundation has introduced a prototype of the Digital Product Passport aimed at electronics, which aims to boost transparency and sustainability throughout the lifecycle of products, right from manufacturing to recycling stages. This innovative initiative is set to revolutionize the electronic industry by providing critical information and enhancing eco-friendly practices.

news.headline: Europe - Important details for the day: Five key points to keep you informed.
Frost & Sullivan Institute recognizes visionary European companies for sustainability efforts in 2024.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on August 9, 2024, the Frost & Sullivan Institute revealed the honorees of the 2024 Enlightened Growth Leadership Best Practices Recognition in Europe. This prestigious award applauds companies that prioritize sustainability in their operations.

news.headline: Winklevoss twins criticize Kamala Harris for no-show at cryptocurrency roundtable, question her commitment to crypto.
news.summary: The Winklevoss twins, founders of Gemini cryptocurrency exchange, are disappointed with Vice President Kamala Harris for missing a recent crypto roundtable. Despite her reported interest in the sector, Cameron Winklevoss noted her repeated absence from events aiming to facilitate dialogue between the White House and crypto industry stakeholders. He expressed frustration over Harris being a no-show once again, stating that while she claims to be into crypto, there is no concrete evidence of progress. Tyler Winklevoss added that Harris has not publicly taken a stance on cryptocurrency.

news.headline: $80 reward for tokens reaching bonding curve on Pump.fun aims to deter rug pulls by memecoin creators.
news.summary: Pump.fun is offering incentives to memecoin creators to ensure a successful token launch, aiming to prevent rug pulls. However, it remains uncertain if this strategy will effectively deter bad actors from manipulating their tokens at an early stage.

news.headline: CBOE re-files 44-page Bitcoin ETF application, signaling progress for options trading on spot ETFs.
news.summary: CBOE submitted a revised 44-page proposal for a rule change that may pave the way for options trading on spot Bitcoin ETFs. This development signals potential progress in allowing this type of trading, offering hope to interested parties.

news.headline: Yangtze Optics Mexico Cable S.A. de C.V. begins operations on Aug 8 in Mexico, YOFC's first facility in the country.
news.summary: Yesterday in Lagos de Moreno, Jalisco State, Mexico, Yangtze Optical Fibre and Cable Joint Stock Limited Company (YOFC) launched its inaugural production plant in the country. Named Yangtze Optics Mexico Cable S.A. de C.V., the facility officially started operations on August 8th, 2024. This signifies a significant step as it is YOFC's first manufacturing site in Mexico.

news.headline: French ILO Unemployment Rate Actual 7.3% (Forecast 7.5%, Previous 7.5%)
New CIO appointed by James Dyson’s family office for $18B empire.
Gala Games unveils Negan Hero Card sale for The Walking Dead: Empires with tiered pricing and instant gameplay, details at website.
news.summary: Gala Games revealed the launch of the Negan Hero Card for The Walking Dead: Empires, which is available for purchase at varying prices and can be used right away in the game.

news.headline: Giant corporations are dominating the world economy, controlling significant market share.
Yen rises 0.3% against the dollar, reversing earlier losses
Investment firm analyzes crypto pricing, stresses importance of accurate valuation in volatile market. #PanteraCapital #cryptocurrency
news.summary: Pantera Capital, a prominent investment firm specializing in cryptocurrencies, has undertaken a detailed examination of the challenges involved in ensuring accurate pricing within the crypto market. Stressing the critical importance of transparent and precise valuation methods in the context of the market's inherent volatility, Pantera Capital's research sheds light on the complexities involved in this process. This emphasis on accuracy comes as cryptocurrencies experience significant fluctuations, with prices constantly shifting. The firm's insights on this issue are particularly relevant given the fast-paced nature of the crypto industry, where even small fluctuations can have substantial impacts. This highlights the necessity for investors to have access to reliable and up-to-date pricing information in order to make informed decisions.

news.headline: Board launches Integrated Development Management Plan for Prince Mohammed bin Salman Royal Reserve in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on Aug. 9, 2024.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on August 9, 2024, the Board of Directors of the Prince Mohammed bin Salman Royal Reserve Development Authority, led by His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince, unveiled the commencement of the Reserve's development plans.

news.headline: July rental income for EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS was 2,573K euros, same as June. Consolidated EBITDA for July was 2,219K euros, up by 31K euros from June.
news.summary: In July, the EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS reported a stable consolidated rental income of 2,573 thousand euros, similar to the figures of June. Additionally, the Fund's consolidated EBITDA for the same month amounted to 2,219 thousand euros, showing an increase of 31 thousand euros compared to the prior month.

news.headline: VGP to webcast review of 1H 2024 financial results on August 9th in Antwerp, Belgium. Year ended June 30, 2024 covered.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Antwerp, Belgium, VGP NV, a prominent European company specializing in top-tier logistics and semi-industrial real estate, revealed plans for a webcast to examine its financial performance for the initial six months concluding on June 30, 2024.

news.headline: Memecoins Pepe, Dogecoin, and Shiba Inu see gains in a market rebound. Pepe up 10.15% to $0.000008713, Dogecoin up 5.92% to $0.1061.
news.summary: Thursday saw a rebound for memecoins in the cryptocurrency market after Monday's slump. Leading the way was Pepe, a frog-themed token on the Ethereum platform, which garnered double-digit gains in the past 24 hours, recovering from losses suffered earlier in the week. Key movements were observed in prominent memecoins: Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) surged by 10.15% to reach $0.000008713, while dogwifhat (CRYPTO: WIF) climbed by 6.52% to hit $1.84. Additionally, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) saw a 5.92% increase, reaching $0.1061 by 11:30 p.m. EDT. Besides these, other blue-chip currencies like Dogecoin and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) exhibited positive movements as well. These developments signify a recovery for memecoins in the broader cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Pound's rally loses steam amid market turmoil and rate cut, impacting the economy.

Global Genetic Engineering Market to reach $2.9 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 6.74%. High demand in biopharmaceuticals and agriculture, driven by advancements like CRISPR-Cas9. North America leads, Asia Pacific rapidly growing. Challenges include high R&D costs and regulatory concerns.
news.summary: The global Genetic Engineering Market size was valued at approximately USD 1,400 Million in 2023, expected to reach USD 1,491.6 Million in 2024 and forecasted to achieve around USD 2,917.2 Million by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 6.74% during 2024-2033. The market is driven by advancements in biopharmaceuticals, gene editing technologies, and applications in agriculture and personalized medicine. North America leads the market, while the Asia Pacific region shows significant growth potential. Major segments include genetic markers, PCR, and gene editing techniques like CRISPR-Cas9. Biotechnology companies are key users, and academic institutions drive innovation. Challenges include ethical concerns and high R&D costs, but opportunities exist in agriculture and personalized medicine. Positive milestones include clinical trials for CRISPR therapies and FDA approvals for gene editing treatments targeting genetic disorders.

news.headline: Donald Trump Jr. launching new crypto platform to compete with banks after revealing DeFi post on X. No memecoins involved.
news.summary: Donald Trump Jr. has clarified the meaning behind his mysterious post on X related to decentralized finance (DeFi). Contrary to speculation, the post has no connection to memecoins or cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Netherlands Manufacturing Production Sees 0.8% Month on Month Increase in June
Netherlands Manufacturing Production Sees 4.9% Year on Year Decrease in June
Mowi ASA (OSE:MOWI) will present Q2 2024 results on August 21, 2024, at 08:00 (CET) in Bergen, Norway.
news.summary: Mowi ASA is inviting individuals to attend the presentation of their second quarter 2024 results at the Scandic Flesland Airport hotel in Bergen, Norway. This event, known as "Vestland på Børs", will provide an opportunity to hear key financial figures and updates on the company's performance during this period. This event will take place at the mentioned location in Bergen, Norway.

news.headline: CleanSpark (Nasdaq: CLSK) delays Q3 2024 financial results webcast scheduled for August 8, 2024, new date to be announced.
news.summary: CleanSpark Inc., traded on Nasdaq under the symbol CLSK, has decided to delay the webcast for its Q3 2024 financial results that was originally set for August 8, 2024. The company is planning to reveal the new date for the webcast shortly.

news.headline: Siegel no longer calls for emergency rate cut, urges Fed to swiftly lower rates to 4%. Fed maintains key rate at 5.25%-5.5%, criticismed. More recent data shows improvement.
news.summary: Jeremy Siegel, a finance professor at the Wharton School, has reversed his call for an immediate 0.75 percentage point interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve. He now suggests a rapid reduction to 4% but no longer deems an emergency cut necessary. The Fed's decision to maintain rates between 5.25%-5.5% was criticized amidst negative economic indicators. However, recent data improvements have dampened the need for immediate action. Siegel still advocates for a swift rate decrease as the economy remains a concern.

news.headline: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. announces dividend for Q2 2024 as return of capital.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece on August 9, 2024, Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. (NYSE: ECO / OSE: OET) disclosed a dividend declaration for its common shares by the board of directors, categorized as a return of capital for accounting intents.

news.headline: China's battery research boom, driven by hefty investment and focus on science education, surpasses other nations in tech advancement.
news.summary: China has taken the lead in scientific research, specifically in battery chemistry, which is vital for its dominance in electric vehicles. The country is emphasizing science education and surpassing other nations in this field. This achievement is reflected in the increasing number of research papers published, with China accounting for a significant portion of the global research output in battery technology. This emphasis on scientific research has contributed to China's advancement in key industries like electric vehicles, showcasing its commitment to innovation and technological progress.

news.headline: Olympics mascot Phryge gains popularity, sales soar in Paris boutiques with merchandise of the cheery red figure.
news.summary: Sales of products featuring the lively red character, inspired by an iconic symbol of the French Revolution, have surged, making it a top seller at various boutiques in Paris.

news.headline: Smokey Bear turns 80, marking 80 years of wildfire prevention education across America. #SmokeyBear80 #PreventWildfires.
news.summary: Celebrating its 80th anniversary, Smokey Bear, a well-known symbol for wildfire prevention in the US, continues to make a significant impact. This iconic PSA campaign has been running for over 80 years, spreading awareness about the importance of preventing wildfires. The campaign, recognized nationwide, has educated Americans on their role in stopping unwanted fires. The milestone of eight decades showcases the enduring impact of Smokey Bear in promoting fire safety and responsibility among the public.
